name: mcp-release
description: Release validation and CI platform for production MCP servers

scripts.typecheck: tsc --build && pnpm --filter @mcp-release/fixture-servers run typecheck && pnpm --filter @mcp-release/web run typecheck && pnpm --filter @mcp-release/public-mcp-fixture run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:ci: pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && tsc --build && pnpm --filter @mcp-release/fixture-servers run typecheck
